name: Propertyware API Vocabulary
description: Terms, schemas, properties, and operations from the Propertyware API

terms.description: Available date to lease for a unit/building.
Indicates if property is featured for rent or sale.
Indicates if the unit/building is featured for rent.
Indicates if unit/building is featured for sale.
Indicates if this building/unit is for sale.
Latitude for geolocation of this building/unit.
Longitude for geolocation of this building/unit.
MLS lease number of this building/unit.
Indicates if pets are allowed in a unit/building.
Posting title name for marketing this building/unit.
Indicates if the unit/building is published for sale.
Indicates if smoking is allowed in this unit/building.
Company where the contact is employed.
Indicates if contact is named on lease.
Indicates if contact is primary contact of the lease.
Date and time the record was created. (Timezone: UTC)
User who last modified the record.
Date and time the record was last modified. (Timezone: UTC)
Id of the lease associated with this transaction.
Id of the owner associated with this transaction.
Id of the vendor associated with this transaction.
Indicates if the call tracking terms have been accepted.
Campaign ID used for call tracking.
Indicates if call tracking is enabled for the campaign.
Number to which call tracking calls are forwarded.
Number to which call tracking calls are forwarded after hours.
Phone number used for call tracking.
Indicates if the document is published to the owner portal.
Indicates if the document is published to the tenant portal.
Charge due day. Allowed values : For frequency "Weekly" (1 to 7) , for other frequency (1 to 31)
Indicates if Bill Split is paid.
Number of bathrooms in the unit.
Number of bedrooms in the unit.
Indicates if property is ready to be leased.
Is Unit is Residential or Commercial.
Date when the accounting period for the portfolio will close.
Portfolio Default Security Deposit Bank Account ID
Indicates that the owner should not be paid owner draws.
Monthly or yearly Maintenance Spending Limit set for the portfolio for maintenance bills created by work orders.
Monthly or Yearly Maintenance Spending Limit Time set for the portfolio for maintenance bills created by work orders.
Minimum balance to be maintained within the portfolio at all times.
Indicates if the application fee has been paid by the prospect.
Indicates if the prospect has pets.
Additional address information of the property.
Unit of measurement for the area of the property.
Time the prospect is living at the current residence.
Type of inquiry made by the prospect.
Move in leasing fee post date.
Move in leasing fee reference number.
Day that the tenant(s) turned in a notice to vacate. Used only for Updating a Lease.

Indicates if the lease has any payment types that they are prevented from using. For example, a lease with several bounced checks may be restricted from paying with checks for future payments.
Allowed values are
(1) None
(2) No Payment Allowed
(3) One or more values separated by comma - Check/Credit Card/Cash/Cashiers Check/Money Order/Section 8/Public Assistance/EPay/RentMoneyOther
Indicates how to post first rent charge while move in.
Primary contact ID, Should be one of tenant IDs.
Indicates how to post first rent charge while move in.
Public assistance program. Allowed values are 'None', 'Section 8', 'SCRIE', 'Rent Control', 'EDEN INC. - Shelter Care Plus', 'CLC', 'DHAP', 'FEMA', 'Harris County' etc.

Reason for vacating the property. Used only for Updating a Lease.
Allowed values: BOUGHT HOUSE, DECEASED, EVICTION, HEALTH, MOVE CITY, PERSONAL, TOO EXPENSIVE, TRANSFER UNIT, UNKNOWN etc.
Move in security deposit charge date.
Amount that was paid in this payment.
Indicates if account is a discount account.
Indicates if account is a escrow account.
Indicates if account is excluded from Form1099.
Indicates if account is excluded from paying in full.
Indicates if excluding from late fees.
Indicates if account is a rent account.
Indicates if the account is security deposit account
Indicates if account is a tax account.
Indicates number of units in the building. Applicable for multi unit building creation and updating a single family building to multi unit building
if we selected naming as "Custom" then enter the customer naming value
End date of the property contract.
Start date of the property contract.
Indicates management fee type of a building. This field is deprecated and should not be used. Instead, use the new field 'managementFeesType'.
Indicates management fee type of a building.
Move in Window must be with in these days given here 1 to 30 and 45,60,75,90
This is required field. False value indicates Multifamily building, True value indicates single family building.
Indicates Unit type like Condo,Lower Unit,Side By Side Duplex,Upper Unit,Townhome,Land,Commercial etc.
Unique identifier of an entity document is attached to.
Type of an entity document is attached to.
Number of days that have passed since the work order was created.
Indicates if work order is approved.
List of vendors attached to the work order.
Indicates if the tenant has granted your management staff access to enter his or her buildings and/or units.
Date on which the work was completed.

This indicates the estimated cost as entered by a person, the actual cost as determined by the work order bills, and the invoiced amount is the amount the owner will see on his or her statement based on the bill and markup/discount amount.
Expected number of hours to complete the work order.
If the work order is attached to an occupied building or unit, this is the lease name of that lease.
Buildings and/or units associated with this work order.
Maintenance notice defined for the building that the work order is attached to.
Name of the person who is responsible for managing the work order.
Number assigned to this work order.
This identifies the priority of the work order as low, medium, or high.
This identifies the person that reported the problem, typically the tenant or owner associated with the buildings or units.
List of materials required to complete the work order.
Date on which the work is scheduled to be completed.
This describes the location in the buildings or units where the work is needed.
Id of the bank account to send the refund from.
Indicates if the check is to be printed.
Indicates if account is a CAM recovery account.
List of Custom fields to update
List of TimeCard Entries to update
Indicates if Transfer balance at year end to Retained earnings.
Indicates if the task has been completed.
Time at which the task was completed.
Comma separated IDs of users to whom the task has been delegated.
Indicates if the task is private.
Indicates if the task has been marked with a star.
List of tags associated with the task.

Valid account types - 1:Bank, 2:Credit Card, 5:Current Asset, 12:Non-Current Asset, 6:Current Liability, 13:Non-Current Liability, 7:Equity, 8:Income, 9:Expense, 10:Non-Operating Income, 11:Non-Operating Expense.
Indicates if prepayments should be auto applied.
Indicates if the account is taxable.
Indicates if the contact can receive eSignature request e-mail messages sent through Propertyware.
Professional title or position for the contact.
Indicates if the account is active.
Indicates if a late fee is applicable.
Indicates if account is a section8 account.
Id of the contact associated with this owner draw.
A collection of payment line items.
Indicates if the commission account is of the passthrough type.
The ID of the markup/discount general ledger account associated with the bill.
The ID of the work order associated with the bill.
Indicates if the building is multi family or single family.
Number of bathrooms in the property.
Number of bedrooms in the property.
City. Required only if Country is United States / Canada.
Country. For US addresses, this value should be "United States". For other countries, this should be the full country name (Canada, United Kingdom, ...)
Zip. Required only if Country is United States / Canada.
State. Required only if Country is United States / Canada.
Portfolio default bank account number and description
Portfolio default security deposit bank account ID
Portfolio default security deposit bank account number and description
Id of the user who last modified the portfolio information.
Id of the entity related to this conversation.
Indicates if refund is for primary contact only
Id of the bank account where the payment was deposited.
Time Tracking, is enabled or disabled

Vendor type. This is a user configurable list with the following initial default values <Banking - General>,
 <Banking - Mortgage>, <Banking - Investment>, <Contractors - Carpentry>, <Contractors - Dry Wall>, <Contractors - Electrical>, <Contractors - Fencing>, <Contractors - Flooring>, <Contractors - General>, <Contractors - HVAC>, <Contractors - Landscaping>, <Contractors - Masonry>, <Contractors - Miscellaneous>, <Contractors - Painting>, <Contractors - Paving>, <Contractors - Plumbing>, <Contractors - Roofing>, <Contractors - Sheet Metal>, <Contractors - Windows>, <Owners>, <Management Company>, <Suppliers - Carpets>, <Suppliers - Electrical>, <Suppliers - General>, <Suppliers - Lighting>, <Suppliers - Lumber>, <Suppliers - Plumbing>, <Suppliers - Security>, <Suppliers - Stone>, <Suppliers - Tiling>, <Suppliers - Windows>, <Utilities - Communications>, <Utilities - Gas & Electric>, <Utilities - Waste Management>, <Utilities - Water>
Indicates if Nacha payment type is enabled.
List of property management fee rules.
Abbreviation of the building associated with this bill split.
Abbreviation of the portfolio associated with this bill split.
Abbreviation of the unit associated with this bill split.
Date and time the inspection closed (customer time zone).
Date and time the inspection occurred (customer time zone).
Date and time the inspection is/was scheduled to occur (customer time zone).
Id of the bank account where the payment will be made from.
Id of the payment causing this prepay application.
List of items in the inspection.
The number of days within payments are due.
Indicates if the task is private.
Id of the custom field definition.
Minimum amount due to trigger the late fee process.
Textual description of the late fee calculation.
Indicates if the payment has been deposited.
The amount due for the charge.
Comma separated list of Transaction IDs.
Textual description of the late fee rule applied to delinquent or unpaid lease charges.
Indicates if the tenants opted into Asset Protection Plan.
Retrieve all the general ledger accounts
Create general ledger accounts in bulk (BETA)
Retrieves all the management fee rules of a building. (BETA)
Retrieves all the property managers of a building
Retrieves all the notes of a building.
Retrieve list of custom field definitions.
Add comment to a lease conversation
Retrieve all lease auto journal entries (BETA)
